text.title: Procurement Management Core Rules
text.summary: 6 testable rules grounding the procurement-management methodology. Each rule pairs a binary check with a sourced rationale; the final rule defines when to skip this methodology entirely.

rule.statement: Evaluation weights MUST be locked BEFORE bids open; post-bid reweighting is favoritism.
rule.rationale: Binary check; non-compliance is the antipattern in `03-failure-modes.xml`.

rule.statement: SOW MUST contain measurable acceptance criteria per deliverable — never 'to PM satisfaction'.
rule.rationale: Binary check; non-compliance is the antipattern in `03-failure-modes.xml`.

rule.statement: Contract type (FFP / T&M / Cost+) MUST be justified per risk profile (FFP = scope known; T&M = scope volatile).
rule.rationale: Binary check; non-compliance is the antipattern in `03-failure-modes.xml`.

rule.statement: All evaluators MUST declare COI before scoring; undeclared COI invalidates scoring.
rule.rationale: Binary check; non-compliance is the antipattern in `03-failure-modes.xml`.

rule.statement: Vendor performance MUST be reviewed at least quarterly against SOW + scorecard.
rule.rationale: Binary check; non-compliance is the antipattern in `03-failure-modes.xml`.

rule.statement: Skip for pre-committed vendors, below-threshold buys, or internal-only work.
rule.rationale: Binary check; non-compliance is the antipattern in `03-failure-modes.xml`.
